TextENGNew: July 2nd, Showa 58 (Saturday). Kimiyoshi house.
changeReason: Date format changed from Western '1983' to Japanese era 'Showa 58', matching the original 昭和５８年 formatting.

TextENGNew: ...Looking at it in hindsight,
earlier, when Toudou-kun saw the decorations covering my entire house... I lost something inside of me.
Toudou-kun acted like he cared about me and said, "...See you at school," then went home and acted like nothing was wrong.
But for a moment, he looked up at those decorations... and had a look of disbelief written across his face. That image was burned into my eyes and wouldn't leave me.
...Even before the disaster, I'd been feeling irritated with Grandma for a while.
Who cares about this curse?
Who cares about Oyashiro-sama?
Mom would always criticize her about it first, so I didn't say anything... but I think my disgust was darker and deeper than anything she said.
I don't believe in gods in the first place.
Gods seem to give men trials and watch from the sidelines, like it's a game to them.
But that sounds more like the work of a demon to me. ...In fact, giving people the impression of a happy future, then taking it away at the last minute... sounds more like the work of a con artist.
Is that wrong? Should I not think of it that way?
Then, prove it. If you claim you'll attain salvation for your faith, that you'll be rewarded for enduring, I want you to show me some legitimate proof.
...Though I was always screaming that in my heart, I never saw any sort of divine blessing. That's why I decided that gods don't exist.
After all... it wasn't a god that rescued me from my disgusting environment back then. It was because they admitted me to the hospital.
...That, and the strange experimental medicine they gave me from there, were able to free me from my suffering.
Since I began taking it, my gloomy emotions have gotten lighter.
Before then, I was frustrated by everything except myself. It made me feel unpleasant... and it pained me to get involved with anyone.
But thanks to that medicine... those dark, depressing feelings gradually diminished, and the obnoxious voices around me began to feel less unpleasant.
So, I continued taking that medicine like my parents recommended.
Taking it several times, every day. ...That was what the people from there decided was best.
But... the medicine was incredibly effective, so I began taking it any time I started to have even the smallest of dark feelings.
And thankfully, there were no side effects. But right after the huge disaster... the supply of medicine to my house suddenly cut off.
So, from then on I had to be more careful about choosing the best times to use it... and I gradually began to feel a lingering dread.
Because... ever since then,
I've heard a voice talking to me, inside my head...
...And no matter how upset I get with it, that voice just won't go away.
It's so annoying. It makes me feel more and more irritable. ...So every time, I took the medicine to make that voice go away.
...But, one day.
After Toudou-kun saw the weird decorations on my house, when I came inside to take off my shoes feeling depressed... that voice spoke to me more directly...
"...Enough already!@k@vS08/36/320100379. What on earth are you?@k@vS08/36/320100380. Answer me...!!"
Heh heh heh... What's wrong, Natsumi? You're so frightened.

"Even when I'm with everyone, and even when I'm alone, you're always talking to me...@k@vS08/36/320100382. Even so, all you do is laugh at me when I answer you!@k@vS08/36/320100383. If you have nothing important to say, leave me alone!"
Heh heh heh... Ahahahaha...
"D-don't laugh!@k@vS08/36/320100385. It's annoying!@k@vS08/36/320100386. ...And, who are you, anyway?@k@vS08/36/320100387. Who on earth are you?!"
Huh? You're asking that now? I thought you already knew... Heh heh heh...
"I-I don't know... I don't know you!@k@vS08/36/320100389. Don't try to lead me astray by saying whatever you want!@k@vS08/36/320100390. Now, go away already!!"
Ahahahahaha. That's a lie. You really do know. You've already realized.
...But you don't want to know, is that it? So you're pretending you don't. ...Right?
Hey, Natsumi. Do you really hate seeing your true self that much?
"Wh-what...?"
Because... you really have an aggressive personality, don't you?
Letting it out is better than keeping it locked inside.
Giving a beating is better than taking a beating.
Making someone cry is better than crying yourself.
And, rather than being killed, killing is...
"Sh... shut up!!"
Huh? Am I wrong? If that's the case, I'll leave right here.
Are you ok with that? Are you?
You can hide your thoughts forever, let them accumulate, wait it out... and keep on struggling to breathe until you die.
It's your choice, that might be a nice way to go.
But... are you really ok with that?
Even if it means losing the things most precious to you.
Toudou-kun seemed really shocked earlier... Are you really okay with him hating you? Aaahahahahahahaha...!!
...Heh heh heh! Of course, I know. There's no way you're okay with that, not at all.
After pining for him so hard, your feelings finally got through to him.
After all, you've finally become a couple with the man whose affection you've always longed for, right...?
Right? Isn't that so?
Didn't you say you were at your happiest when your feelings got through to him?
Didn't you say you could give up anything for that...?
".......@k@vS08/36/320100398. Right... That's right...@k@vS08/36/320100399. I don't want to lose him... Toudou-kun is mine...!"
Right? Ahahahaha, I understand how you feel, Natsumi.
But thanks to that crazy old hag, everything's gone to waste.
Tough luck, your love ends here.
...Are you satisfied with that? Ahahahahaha. You could never be, right?!
"...I'm not... I could never be satisfied with that...!@k@vS08/36/320100401. It's all... her fault! All her...!"
Aaahahahahahha! Right, that's it!
That's the right feeling. Doesn't that feel better?
Nobody knows the pain you keep hidden. Nobody notices.
Then... why endure it?
Maybe someday, the gods will be watching over you and grant your wish. Is that what you believe?
"...Not a chance!@k@vS08/36/320100403. The gods... the gods won't do anything... for me...!!"
Yeah, I understand.
Then it's simple... I'll help you.
...Ok? Listen carefully.
You'll get a phone call from Mom soon.
...I'm not just making a random guess. Because this always happens. Whenever Mom finishes her errands, she always calls home.
And when she calls, you can tell her about the old hag.
Yes, while crying. ...That's important, ok?
Then, the old hag will hear and start to feel worried, so she'll come to talk to you. And then, when she comes from behind... or from the side, make sure you have your back turned to her.
So, you'll be so surprised when she suddenly calls out to you, that you'll instinctively try to shake off her grip, and unfortunately push her away.
Then, she'll coincidentally smack her head against the furniture that stood in her path, and regrettably end up dying...
Got it? You only have one chance.
If you miss this opportunity, you'll keep spending the rest of your life putting up with everything like you always have.
So... put yourself at ease, ok?
Nobody will know... Nobody will blame you.
Nobody would believe someone as pure as you would commit a murder.
Ahahahahahaha, ahahahahahahahahahahaha...!!
*rustle* *rustle* *rustle* *rustle*.....
It felt like a foreign body had entered my eardrum.
Like something was crawling around behind my ear.
(...I won't give in.)
Even now, she continues reciting those weird prayers to a god I don't believe in. Without even a care for how much trouble and unhappiness it inflicts upon us.
(I won't give in, I won't give in, I won't give in, I won't give in, I won't give in...!!)
Right. I can't rely on anyone. No one will help me.
I've been leaving that thing to her own devices because no matter how much I feared her rants, and felt doubt and disgust toward her, I was too uneasy to completely reject her.
I abandoned my pursuit of happiness and took the easy way out, submitting to her control!
But, that all ends here! I'm going to grab hold of my happiness!
I won't give in!
Even if I'm alone in the end, I won't give in! I won't let go of the happiness I've grabbed hold of!!
I won't give in, I won't give in, I won't give in, I won't give iiiin!!
Right... that thing is no longer the Grandma I know. It's an ugly, filthy, non-human creature.
She just pretends she's one of us, sitting around like she owns the place...
Disgusting, filthy thing! Disappear, disappear, disappear, disappear, disappeeear!!
Look closely, Natsumi Kimiyoshi. Clear your mind, open your eyes, and look at that thing.
That thing taking on the appearance of Grandma is your enemy...! Her body was taken over. She's an enemy now!
So, you need to drag that thing out as soon as possible and return everything to the way it once was.
Only you can do it, Natsumi. Come on...!!
*scrape* *scrape*
...Aah, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up.
The stronger my sense of duty grows, the more the whispers in the back of my ear urge me to hurry up and kill that thing, telling me now's my only chance.
Yeah, I get it already. No need to goad me on any further.
I'll never forgive the people who destroy my happiness...!
*scrape* *scrape*... *scrape*
When I entered that thing's room, the smell of incense was in the air and that thing was muttering something towards the altar.
When that thing noticed me, she gently raised her head and looked back.
Don't look me in the eyes... with that kindly expression on your face!!
"Natsumi-chan... what's going on?"
Ahahahahahaha. ...The time has come.
Since you can't make me submit by force, you're trying to win me over with that soothing voice?
Imitating Grandma's voice... how insolent!!
It seems like you're trying to distract me, but sorry.
I've already seen your true identity. So I won't be fooled any longer!
"Natsumi-chan...?"
Turning on my heels, I left the room.
...My heart ached for a moment over what I was about to do.
But... that wasn't Grandma in front of me. It was that thing, wearing Grandma's skin.
So... I made up my mind. It was time to act.
It will only take a few minutes. I just need to muster a little courage...!!
Behind me, I could hear the sound of clanking beads as the prayers began again.
"...Here on god's earth... we offer this to you... Accept this offering...@k@vS08/00/320800004. I see your work... unfinished... great god Oyashiro..."
"...Here on god's earth... we offer this to you... Accept this offering...@k@vS08/00/320800006. I see your work... unfinished... great god Oyashiro..."
Shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up, shut up.
That's enough. Reciting those sickening incantations is what drove this whole house crazy!
Like the song a snake charmer uses to coax a serpent from a vase, bringing that thing into this house.
...But like usual, that person continued stupidly offering those devout prayers to Oyashiro-sama.
At this point, with the anger on the verge of bursting from my chest, I no longer felt merciful.
...Hoping to cut off that harsh sound, I closed the door to the living room behind me, a suffocating atmosphere coiling around my body.
"...Here on god's earth... we offer this to you... Accept this offering...@k@vS08/00/320800008. I see your work... unfinished... great god Oyashiro..."
"...Here on god's earth... we offer this to you... Accept this offering...@k@vS08/00/320800010. I see your work... unfinished... great god Oyashiro..."
Nonetheless, I could still clearly hear the voice of that thing muttering those prayers.
Hearing that sound... something suddenly snapped inside me... and became unleashed.
The next moment, the phone began to ring. Based on the timing, it had to be Mom.
"...Yes, hello."
"Oh, Natsumi?@k@vS08/00/320600002. It's Mom."
This is it...!!
I unconsciously cried tears of relief, as a smile spilled across my lips.
Now... dance, Mom. Just the way I planned...!!
"M-Mom, Mom!!@k@vS08/36/320100413. ...I, I... What should I do...?!"
"...Natsumi?@k@vS08/00/320600004. What's wrong, why are you crying?!@k@vS08/00/320600005. What happened, Natsumi?!"
"Grandma...@k@vS08/36/320100415. Grandma put those weird decorations all over the house...!!"
"N-no way... at our home?!"
"What should I do? ...What should I do? Someone will see it...!@k@vS08/36/320100417. Other people... will think our house is weird when they see it...!!"
...Hey, Grandma, did you hear that?
What I said over the phone...
Hurry up and notice... and come over here, okay?
Just then... I could sense someone moving in the room that thing was in.
Good... Good, good. This is it!
Now, come over here!!
"...Natsumi, get out of there!!"
Just then, on the other end of the phone, Mom tried to warn me of the impending danger.

"It's strange... everyone is acting strange!@k@vS08/00/320600009. And it's not just at our house, it's all our elderly relatives!!@k@vS08/00/320600010. So, you need to get out of there, Natsumi!!@k@vS08/00/320600011. Hurry!!"
Hyaahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!!!
Whooooooaaah!! Amazing! Amazing, Mom!! That was an excellent line, nice setup!!!
You're always such a nag and an eyesore, but now you're great, Mom!! This is a perfect setup for a justifiable self-defense claim!!!
The preparations are complete!!
Now, I just need to wait for that thing to come closer...!!
"...Natsumi-chan."
Hehehehehehehehehehehehe!! Gyahahahahahahahahahahahaha!!!
Come, come to me! Like a fish following the bait, come here without suspecting a thing!!
Incredible, this is incredible!! Everything is going as planned, isn't it?!
Then, fearing I might jeopardize up the operation, I hung up the receiver.
...I feared that if I kept going, I might let out a laugh.
"Natsumi-chan..."
Now... it was getting closer.
That thing made a racket as they slowly came up the hallway behind me.
"Everything is all right, ok...?@k@vS08/00/320800015. So, don't cry, ok...?"
Standing five meters away...
Four...
Three...
"Everything is fine... so you can relax, ok?"
Two...
One...
Just a little more... come quickly!
...Then, on my neck.
I felt an uncomfortable breath, and turned back.
"Natsumi-cha..."
"Grandma."
Before pushing her down, I double-checked the preparations.
"...Bye bye."
I took the initiative and swung my arms...
That thing immediately fell silent... and I looked down with a surprisingly cold heart.
As I gazed into the darkness, I saw the faint silhouette of that thing, which had come up to me without suspecting a thing.
Even when I closed my eyes, that image was burned into the back of my eyelids...
"...Hehe, ehehehehehe.@k@vS08/36/320100425. Ahahahahahahaha..."
It was unbelievable. It was incredibly surprising that the plan went out exactly as intended.
Grandma hit a bad spot, and that was the end of it. ...Then, when Mom and Dad came home and found me crying, neither of them blamed me at all.
Now... it's not over yet.
This is where the real show begins, Natsumi Kimiyoshi...!
"Hehehehehehehehe... ahahahahahahahahaha."
Right... That's right.
The true identity of that thing was a demon. So, this was a demon extermination...
"...? Na-Natsumi... what are you doing?!"
I dragged Grandma's corpse into the bathroom.
And... I dragged Dad's wooden toolbox from the back room in, too.
From there, I pulled out the appropriate tool, and I...
"Eeek?!"
...The odor encircled the area.
In that extraordinarily stagnant air... I couldn't help but vomit.
No good... I can't get cold feet here.
I swear I'm going to grab hold of my happiness... with my own hands...!!
"...Na-Natsumi?!"
"...You both understand, right?@k@vS08/36/320100428. Dad, Mom.@k@vS08/36/320100429. This is the only way for us to be happy..."
I looked back at the two of them, panting in terror, and said that with a smile on my face.
"A high school girl killing her grandmother...@k@vS08/36/320100431. You'll lose your job if that hits the newspapers, Dad."

"And Mom, you'll lose all your friends. And our relatives will disown you and refuse to let you return to the village.@k@vS08/36/320100433. ...Oh, but I suppose the gas disaster already took care of that for the most part. ...Right?"
"D-do you understand what you're saying...?!"
"Th-that's right, Natsumi!@k@vS08/00/320700003. There's no way, you...!!"
"Yeah. I know.@k@vS08/36/320100435. Mom, you made me go to prep school and study hard every day so you could show off to all our relatives."
"And Dad, you lied and said I was hospitalized for anemia because you were worried the real reason would undercut your career advancement.@k@vS08/36/320100437. ...Am I wrong?"
"Th-that's...!!"
Right... since I began elementary school, I was forced into studying every night even though I didn't want to...
I was always told, "You should be studying, not playing," so without a proper experience playing with friends, I developed difficulties talking with other people.
And thanks to that, my heart grew strained, enraged, and torn apart...
Then, I was finally hospitalized and subjected to various unpleasant medications, and forced into those tedious counseling sessions day after day...
And once I finally got better, it seemed like things would get a little easier... but you used a job change as an excuse to transfer me to a prep school, starting the whole thing all over again.
Ahahahaha. ...I knew it. The two of you don't regret a thing.
And even as I desperately crawl up from the depths of Hell... you don't understand that it's your fault things turned out this way.
Pushing me on without my consent... all while constantly running away from the responsibility of tearing my soul to shreds!!
"Ahahahaha.@k@vS08/36/320100439. What's wrong with you two? Your faces are turning blue."
"I'm doing the same thing both of you did.@k@vS08/36/320100441. So, this shouldn't seem strange at all.@k@vS08/36/320100442. Right?@k@vS08/36/320100443. You did it all for my sake, didn't you?"
"Na-Natsumi..."
Mom and Dad stared at me like they were looking at a completely different person.
And trembled in astonishment.
We need to hide Grandma somewhere before anyone can see her. Because if the body is gone, then there is no crime.
I had to rid this house of the demon living inside. I had to cleanse it.
...Right? I'm not mistaken, am I?
"...Alright, Mom.@k@vS08/36/320100445. ...You'll help me, won't you?"
The family should work together to protect the family's happiness... right?
You don't want to lose... the precious life you've built up in this city, do you?
"?! H-Haruko!@k@vS08/00/320700006. You too?! What are you doing?!"
Dad raised his voice.
Mom stopped moving her hands for a moment to mutter at him.
"...This is a demon extermination."
Aaahahahahaaahahahahahaaahahahahahahahah!!
Kyahaha, ahahahaaahahahahaaahahah!!
She gave in!! She bent to my will!!!
She always talked down to me all high and mighty with one platitude after the next, but when it really comes down to it, she's just acting in self-preservation?!
Ahahahahahaha, how hilarious!! You're all so hilarious!!
How weak! Is that the best your brains can do?!
That's fine, you don't have to think about anything!! I'll take care of everythiiing!!!
...Aah, I heard that.
Mom's heavy breathing and Dad's sobbing.

Yes, this is an unfortunate accident. ...So for the two of them, they're acting according to my will not because a family member died... but because they're afraid they'll lose their current way of life as a result.
...After that, Dad drove us somewhere deep in the mountains that nobody would ever find.
And at last... the demon was removed from our house.
July 9th, Showa 58 (Saturday).
changeReason: Date format changed from Western '1983' to Japanese era 'Showa 58', matching the original 昭和５８年 formatting.

TextENGNew: Thanks to that obnoxious detective earlier today, my light self was down in the dumps, setting the stage for my turn when heading back to the house.
Though I managed to talk to Toudou-kun directly for once along the way, so that was one benefit.
Well, given the way he was acting, he probably hasn't figured out about me... Mwahaha!
That relief and fleeting peace... was shattered to pieces by a news bulletin flowing out of the TV when I came home.

"This afternoon, the body of a woman was found on a rural road inside the mountains of Gifu prefecture.@k@vS08/00/VT2B_Tvann1006. Her age is estimated between 70 and 90 years old, and at the moment the police are..."
In the dimly lit dining room, Mom and Dad were gazing raptly at the TV screen.

Based on the apples and knives on the table, they were probably in the middle of peeling fruit. But neither of them had their hands on it, and their faces were despondent and blue... with a look of despair.
They must not have noticed my return. Dad looked back with a shocked expression.
After that terse greeting, I walked in front of the TV and stared intently at the screen.
Elderly woman, age between 70 and 90 years old.
Considering the timing, there was no room for doubt. ...How did they find it so quickly?
Anyway there was no point regretting it in hindsight. ...But, what should we do now?
The next moment.
"...Natsumi."
Dad broke the silence and called out to me.
"Natsumi... let's turn ourselves in."
Hey hey hey hey hey!
Turn ourselves in, now?! After all the measures we've taken to avoid doing that?! What an idiotic thing to suggest!!
...No, wait a minute.
Could Dad have...?!
"Na-Natsumi.@k@vS08/00/320700014. ...Go to the police and atone for your sins.@k@vS08/00/320700015. I will come with you."

"Wh... why?@k@vS08/36/320100452. Even though we've gotten our old lives back! Even though the demon is gone...!@k@vS08/36/320100453. So, why?@k@vS08/36/320100454. Why are you suggesting something that would destroy my happiness, Dad...?"
"...I'm sorry.@k@vS08/00/320700017. I intentionally left Grandma in a place where she would be discovered..."
...Aah, I knew it.
I suspected that might be the case.
Well, maybe I should commend him for the fact that it still took them a week to find it.
Even so... your heart is weak.
"I want to awaken from this nightmare as soon as possible... That's all I want...@k@vS08/00/320700019. And I can't bear the weight of more sins upon our consciences!"
"I think we need to pay for our sins before Grandma can truly be put to rest..."
"Dear..."
As Mom began bursting into tears, Dad put his arms around her shoulders.
Staring at the two of them caused something to well up from the bottom of my heart.

"No way...!@k@vS08/36/320100457. Everything was going so well!@k@vS08/36/320100458. I thought I could regain those happy days!@k@vS08/36/320100459. And yet... Mom, Dad... are the two of you going to ruin that?!"
"...You have to wake up, Natsumi!@k@vS08/00/320700022. Accept reality!"
"I don't want to... I don't want that...@k@vS08/36/320100461. No, no, no, nooooo!!"
...The next moment.
After I finished crying out, another thought came to me.
...Yes.
I've already killed one person.
Even if that escalated to two or three people... would that really change anything?
It wouldn't change anything, right?
Even as things are now... if I'm caught, I won't be able to go back to my old life.
And even if I avoided capture... that would still be impossible.
Then... what should I do?
Hit the reset button?
Or make it so that none of it ever happened, like stopping a novel part way through when you know it has a tragic ending waiting for you?
Yes... this is fine.
Hinamizawa was the reason I dirtied my hands with this crime in the first place.
It's all Mom and Dad's fault for turning me to murder. They're the ones who locked me in a cramped cage to suit their egos.
Hey... That's a good enough reason, isn't it?
So, it's not my fault. Mom and Dad are in the wrong here.
And... besides.
Are these people really thinking of me and my best interests here?
And then.
Dad put his hands on my shoulders and shook his head, then with a merciless expression... he said to me.
"Natsumi.@k@vS08/00/320700024. ...You're the one who killed her."
"That kind, gentle old woman..."
"Y-you're... wrong...!"
"Natsumi... you killed her..."
...Aah, I see.
If you were really trying to protect me, you wouldn't have intentionally left the body somewhere easy to find, right?!
So... this is a trap.
You were planning to hand me over to the police from the beginning, and just trying to protect yourselves!!
How impertinent... how filthy... Is this what adults are?! Is this what my parents are?!!
No... No! It's not my fault!!
It's not my fault, not my fault, not my fault, not my fault...!!
"Natsumi..."
"Natsumi."
Mom and Dad were glaring at me with a gaze that pierced through my entire body.
The two of them surrounded me to cut off my escape, and their eyes glistened as they continued glaring at me.
...Looking down on me, like a detestable sinner.
Then... the moment I turned my gaze downward, I saw Mom and Dad's shadows on the tatami mat.
And on the heads of those shadows, I saw two sharp, protruding horns...
That's it... That's it...!
These people are not my Mom and Dad! ...These are demons, trying to take away my happiness!!
"...Hyaah... *cough* *cough* ...Urrgh!!"
The fear drove me to vomit.
...I felt a burning pain in the back of my throat!
"Wogh... urghyaaah... hiihuaa...!!!"
There's a demon in my body! ...A demon, devouring my heart...!!
"...? Natsumi...?"
Dad seemed terrified as he looked at my current state.
I had lost my voice. My throat was so dry, I couldn't even breathe.
The pain felt like my eyes were about to pop out.
"Na... Natsumi?!"
"Haah, haah, haah...!!"
As I stood up... I grabbed ahold of the fruit knife behind my back.
...Exterminate them.
I'll exterminate every single demon living in this house.
I'll get back my original happiness as soon as possible.
This ordinary, but peaceful family of four.
My precious friends from school, Chisato-chan and Tamako-chan.
And, my beloved Toudou-kun... looking at me with that gentle gaze.
To regain everything... I'll get rid of these demons... with my own hands...
"Wh-what... Natsumi?@k@vS08/00/320700031. ...What on earth are you doing?!"
What am I doing...?
Ehehehehehe... this is a demon extermination, right? ...So, disappear!!
I looked at the expression of disbelief on Dad's face as I pierced his defenseless throat with the fruit knife in a single stroke.
...Dad only managed to let out a single hoarse sound before falling to the floor, dead.
Aah, he was always a quiet person, even in the end...
Ahahahahahaha, ahahahahahahahahahahaha...!!
"Eeeek...@k@vS08/00/320600024. D-d-don't come any closer..."
Then Mom scurried away into the living room, and I followed behind her.
Mom's eyes were opened wide and she trembled as she inched back.
"...M... Mom... Mom...@k@vS08/36/320100475. Why... are you running... away...?!"
"Gyaaaaa!!!"
Mom screamed as she made to escape. ...But, at best she could only keep crawling.
"Mom...?@k@vS08/36/320100477. ...Mom, you're on my side... right?"
"...Hiiiiaaaa..."
Her legs were tangled around each other, but Mom didn't stop her retreat.
The tatami mats rustled and creaked underfoot.
"...There's still a demon here, I can hear it...!@k@vS08/36/320100479. It needs to be destroyed... Destroooyed!!!"
"Hiiiiii!!!"
"Th-the demon... the demon is... Ughyaaaa!!!"
I rushed over to Mom as she tried to escape, and raised the weapon in my hand overhead...
Ding-dong! Ding-dong!
...I heard a chime off in the distance.
*rustle* *rustle* *rustle* *rustle*
That sound was blocked out by an echoing sound like a spider crawling in my ear.
Trying to shake off these annoying sounds, I... did it... over and over... and over and over again...
And every time, the blood splattered up onto my hands and down to the floor.
*rustle* *rustle* *rustle* *rustle*
...Suddenly, the sound ceased.
Keeping the fruit knife held tight, I climbed over the pool of blood.
The pure red pedicure on the toes of my bare feet blended together with the blood covering the tatami mat.
Now, even looking at Mom and Dad's bodies lying on the floor, I didn't feel anything.
Because the creatures lying in front of me were not my parents.
A demon wearing Dad's skin, and a demon wearing Mom's skin... They were demons...!
"Eheheheheeheheehehehe...@k@vS08/36/320100484. Ahahahahaaahahahahaaahahaha!!!"
The demons... have been exterminated.
And with this, my everyday happiness will return to me.
I... won.
And I didn't rely on anyone. I did it with my own strength...!!
The next moment, I suddenly looked down.
And in the blood-stained fruit knife... I saw Toudou-kun's reflection.
I lowered my face and wiped away the blood, then turned back slowly.
Then, on the other side of the ransacked room... I saw Toudou-kun standing there with a dumbfounded expression, completely lost for words.
"...Kimiyoshi... You...?!"
"Uh, umm... I, I..."
I got up and tried to walk closer to Toudou-kun.
His listless face quickly grew tenser as he gazed at me with unfocused eyes... and when I saw myself reflected in his eyes, I was at a loss for words.
Are those two horns on my head...?!
I see... There's still a demon here. There's another demon inside this house...!
And... the last demon... is me?!
No... No!! I don't want him to see it! I don't want to him to know it!!
Toudou-kun is the last person I wanted to know I was a demon!!
"...Toudou-kun.@k@vS08/36/320100489. You love me... right?"
As I muttered that,
I grabbed a vase sitting in the shrine... and while Toudou-kun continued staring in bewilderment, I immediately swung it down on him.
Before my eyes, Toudou-kun began to bleed from his head... and collapsed to the ground.
"...Ah, aah.@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1002. You've finally done it... Natsumi."
As I stood there quietly, the other me spoke to me and laughed.

"What will you do?@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1004. Your beloved Toudou-kun saw everything, right?@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1005. He's unconscious now, but he might forget everything when he wakes up...@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1006. Yeah right. As if reality would be so convenient.@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1007. Aaahahahahahahaha...!!"
"Wh... what should I do...?"
"Isn't that obvious?@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1009. You can't do anything anymore. There's nothing left.@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1010. So, the police are going to come for you now."

"I'll tell you now, escape is impossible at this point.@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1012. Because Toudou-kun will definitely tell the police what happened just now.@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1013. So, they'll chase you down and arrest you."

"...Maybe losing yourself to despair and committing suicide would be a good option at this point?@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1015. Then, when Toudou-kun's injuries heal, he'll be able to find a happy ending with a certain someone.@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1016. He might even forget about you soon enough... Mwahaha!!"
A certain someone...
A certain someone, you say...?!
You mean that hypocrite and liar?!!

"Yes, that's right!@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1018. ...So, I have a question for you.@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1019. Are you going to leave Toudou-kun the way he is?@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1020. Leave him alone and let him be taken? By that certain someone?@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1021. ...Are you ok with that?"
f course not... Of course I'm not!
Even though I've suffered so much and struggled through this misery, she's going to take my happiness away without saying anything or lifting a finger...!!
I won't allow it!
I can't!!
If the alternative is giving him up to her, then I'll...!!
"I'm sorry... I'm sorry, Toudou-kun...!@k@vS08/36/320100496. ...Hehe, ehehehehehehe.@k@vS08/36/320100497. Ahahahahahahaha, haaaah, hahahahah!!"
*scratch* *scratch*
My throat... was burning hot.
As I broke through the skin, it felt like something was about to burst out.
A lukewarm sensation surrounded my fingernails.
Aah, itchy, itchy, itchy, ITCHY...!!
*scratch* *scratch* *scratch*
...Hey, Toudou-kun.
I love you.
That's why... you see?
You and I... will be together forever...
The police...?!
That can't be? How did they get here so soon?!
When I heard that voice in my head and realized it wasn't truly my own voice, I managed to return to myself for a moment...
(...Stop this already!!!)
...As I screamed that,
Something inside me snapped, and the thread that was holding me together... was cut.
"Wha?!@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1023. Y-you... I thought I already erased all traces of you??@k@vS08/36/VT2B_Bnatsu1024. So why?! How can this be...?"
